long_description:
Created from incident source: Parent Incident
Parent incident id: INC10513890
Parent incident caller: TIP.SA
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[COM] Insufficient running pods for deployment is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/deployment-pods-not-running.html
TIP Situation: Deployment pod is down
TIP Short Description: Some server-node-controller pods are not running in mzone2l7 for the past 10 minutes
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2l7:microservice:server-node-controller

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    kube_deployment_spec_replicas = 1
    kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready = 0
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2l7' and kube_deployment_name = 'server-node-controller'
Scope:
    kube_namespace_name in ('genctl', 'rias')
    kube_deployment_name in ('capacity-pool-controller', 'vm-instance-controller', 'compute-action-controller', 'virtual-disk-controller', 'virtual-nic-controller', 'vm-migration-controller', 'vm-scheduler', 'compute-node-controller', 'placement-group-controller', 'local-disk-controller', 'pci-device-controller', 'bm-server-controller', 'bm-server-manager', 'server-node-controller', 'server-scheduler', 'regional-extension-server', 'genctl-extension-server')

Time:             12/09/2025 06:14 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://eu-fr2.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/046ffe990811498fad77d175c08cef71/db898621-ecd3-4ddd-93c3-d6651c732478?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F118340528%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Name:         [COM] Insufficient running pods for deployment
Description:  Some replica pods in the deployment is not running for the past 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations

    kube_namespace_name in ('genctl', 'rias')
    kube_deployment_name in ('capacity-pool-controller', 'vm-instance-controller', 'compute-action-controller', 'virtual-disk-controller', 'virtual-nic-controller', 'vm-migration-controller', 'vm-scheduler', 'compute-node-controller', 'placement-group-controller', 'local-disk-controller', 'pci-de
